title: origanum haussknechtii
intro: Origanum haussknechtii, also known as Habselig or Persian marjoram, is a perennial shrub native to the Middle East and Central Asia. This plant is a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Origanum haussknechtii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Traditionally, the leaves of this plant are used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
